programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Alicia Silverstone) plays matchmaker for teachers, transforms a bad dresser (Brittany Murphy) and examines her own existence. Starring Alicia Silverstone, Stacey Dash, Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: The Fabelmans
programme.desc: Young Sammy Fabelman falls in love with movies after his parents take him to see "The Greatest Show on Earth." Armed with a camera, Sammy starts to make his own films at home, much to the delight of his supportive mother. Starring Michelle Williams, Paul Dano, Seth Rogen.

programme.title: One Week
programme.desc: A dire medical diagnosis prompts a young man (Joshua Jackson) to search for meaning in his life via a cross-country trek across Canada on a vintage motorcycle. Starring Joshua Jackson, Liane Balaban, Chris Benson.

programme.title: Real Time
programme.desc: A killer gives a gambler an hour to live. Starring Randy Quaid, Jay Baruchel, Ella Chan.

programme.title: Being Julia
programme.desc: In 1938 London a theatrical actress (Annette Bening) devises an elaborate scheme against the social climber who used her. Starring Annette Bening, Jeremy Irons, Bruce Greenwood.

programme.title: Long Life, Happiness and Prosperity
programme.desc: A child (Valerie Tian) unwittingly wreaks havoc around her when she tries magic spells to find a new husband for her divorced, overworked mother (Sandra Oh). Starring Sandra Oh, Valerie Tian, Tsai Chin.

programme.title: Cooking With Stella
programme.desc: A woman cooks for clients and tries to keep her thefts of food and money from being discovered. Starring Don McKellar, Seema Biswas, Lisa Ray.

programme.title: How the West Was Fun
programme.desc: Twin girls (Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen) hatch a plan to save an old womans dude ranch from shady developers. Starring Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen, Martin Mull.

programme.title: The Muppets Take Manhattan
programme.desc: Kermit and company try to take their variety show to Broadway, while Miss Piggy grows jealous of a friendly waitress. Starring Jim Henson, Frank Oz, Dave Goelz.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Louisa May Alcotts classic story of the lives, loves and triumphs of four sisters in Civil War-era New England. Starring Winona Ryder, Gabriel Byrne, Trini Alvarado.

programme.title: 13 Going on 30
programme.desc: A girl makes a wish on her thirteenth birthday, and wakes up the next day as a thirty-year-old woman. Starring Jennifer Garner, Mark Ruffalo, Judy Greer.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The All-American Girls Professional Baseball League begins in 1943 with a major-league has-been as a manager. Starring Tom Hanks, Geena Davis, Madonna.

programme.title: Big Fish
programme.desc: A young journalist (Billy Crudup) searches for the truth behind the tall tales told by his ailing father (Albert Finney). Starring Ewan McGregor, Albert Finney, Billy Crudup.

programme.title: The Imitation Game
programme.desc: Genius British logician and cryptologist Alan Turing (Benedict Cumberbatch) helps crack Germanys Enigma Code during World War II but is later prosecuted by his government for illegal homosexual acts. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley, Matthew Goode.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Ellen and Brian attend Beltane, a festival to celebrate the coming of summer, where sins are burned away by the needfire; Henry struggles to hold onto his hope and Julia loses allies when secrets come out.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Survivors (Cillian Murphy, Noah Huntley, Naomie Harris) try to stay a step ahead of vicious, virus-infected humans that have overrun London. Starring Cillian Murphy, Noah Huntley, Naomie Harris.

programme.title: 28 Weeks Later
programme.desc: As the U.S. Army tries to restore order, a carrier of rage virus enters London and reinfects the populace. Starring Robert Carlyle, Rose Byrne, Jeremy Renner.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: Matthias and Maxime
programme.desc: Two young mens lifelong friendship is tested when they act in a movie whose script calls for them to kiss each other. Starring Gabriel DAlmeida Freitas, Xavier Dolan, Harris Dickinson.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While an old friend of Magnus, a pouched abnormal named Jimmy, is handing over a fire elemental to the Sanctuary team, they are attacked by a gang of criminal abnormals from Chicago; the situation presents a lot of mysteries to be solved quickly.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When rich youngsters begin to disappear after an apparent death and then come back to life, the trail leads Will and Magnus to a drug clinic in Mexico run by Nicola Tesla.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary LEGO figurine Emmet, thought to be the key to saving the world, is accompanied by a fellowship of strangers embarking on a quest to vanquish a tyrant bent on a terrible deed. Starring Chris Pratt, Will Ferrell, Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Little Monsters
programme.desc: A nice monster called Maurice (Howie Mandel) lures a boy (Fred Savage) through the floor, into an underworld of prankish goons. Starring Fred Savage, Howie Mandel, Daniel Stern.

programme.title: Maudie
programme.desc: From childhood to her deathbed, a woman experiences love, loss and discrimination. Starring Patricia Ann Hoffman, Meberate Brooks, Kayla Monnot-Edwards.

programme.title: Snowtime!
programme.desc: Children (Angela Gallupo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball) in a small village learn valuable life lessons when they form two teams for a massive snowball fight. Starring Angela Galuppo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parkers quest to solve his parents disappearance puts him on a collision course with a scientists deadly alter ego, the Lizard. Starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Rhys Ifans.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Greater conflict lies ahead for Spider-Man, with the emergence of Electro, a foe far more powerful than he is and the return of his old friend, Harry Osborn. Starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Jamie Foxx.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: New York City becomes the bullet-riddled playground of a former assassin (Keanu Reeves) as he hunts down the Russian mobsters who destroyed everything he held dear. Starring Keanu Reeves, Michael Nyqvist, Alfie Allen.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: When new surgical nurse Mia arrives at the hospital, she quickly turns her charm on married colleagues, Charlotte and Jacob, who cant help but feel unsettled when she unexpectedly moves into the house next door.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: After a wild night out, Charlotte tries to distance herself from Mia; Charlottes ex, Leo, returns to the hospital and at the fundraising ball, his and Jacobs mutual dislike is palpable; Mias reaction to a death at the hospital raises eyebrows.

programme.title: Passchendaele
programme.desc: Sgt. Dunne (Paul Gross) returns to war to look after a nurses brother. Starring Caroline Dhavernas, Gil Bellows, Paul Gross.

programme.title: Goon: Last of the Enforcers
programme.desc: After one too many injuries, hockey player Doug Glatt leaves the game and becomes an insurance salesman at the urging of his pregnant wife. His retirement is short-lived as he laces up the skates once again to try and reclaim his former glory. Starring Seann William Scott, Liev Schreiber, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Night Raiders
programme.desc: In a post-war future, a mother joins an underground band of vigilantes to try and rescue her daughter from a state-run institution. Starring Elle-Maija Tailfeathers, Brooklyn Letexier-Hart, Alex Tarrant.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and the team rescue passengers and crew from a sinking ship, taking them back to Sanctuary for medical treatment.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and Kate travel to Mumbai to investigate a murder and the connection to the ancient cult of Kali, whose followers can foretell disaster.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: After losing a rigged sled race, Frankie challenges newcomer Zac to one last showdown. With the stakes higher than ever, Zac will stop at nothing to win the race. Starring Lucinda Davis, Noel Fisher, Angela Galuppo.

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: A girl in Nazi-occupied France goes into hiding with help from a schoolmate -- a boy who risks everything to give her the chance to survive. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation. Starring Ariella Glaser, Orlando Schwerdt, Helen Mirren.

programme.title: Goose!
programme.desc: A boy (Max Morrow) conspires to save a talking gander from a man (Chevy Chase) who plans to cook the bird in an upcoming culinary contest. Starring Chevy Chase, Kari Matchett, Max Morrow.

programme.title: Manufactured Landscapes
programme.desc: The work of photographer Edward Burtynsky includes Chinas ongoing Industrial Revolution.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community. Starring Timmy Masso, Grace George, Joe Martin.

programme.title: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: A Canadian sculptor (Jeff Daniels) builds an ultralight plane so his teen daughter (Anna Paquin) can lead geese south. Starring Jeff Daniels, Anna Paquin, Dana Delany.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: A thief (Leonardo DiCaprio) who enters peoples dreams and steals their secrets gets a shot at redemption when he is given the dangerous task of planting an idea in someones subconscious. Starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fueled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Batman and his new ally Wonder Woman recruit Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash to help them save the planet from a newly awakened enemy. Starring Ben Affleck, Henry Cavill, Gal Gadot.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Legendary hit man John Wick comes out of retirement when a former associate plots to seize control of an international assassins guild. Bound by a blood oath to help him, Wick travels to Rome to square off against the worlds deadliest killers. Starring Keanu Reeves, Common, Laurence Fishburne.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: To mark 20 years together, Jacob plans a surprise trip to Antwerp for Charlotte; when a third person joins, things take an erotic, dangerous turn; cul-de-sac outcast Alan dusts off his telescope.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Upon her return from Antwerp, Charlotte throws herself into her work; Gossip about the trip spreads throughout the hospital, leading to tension; Mia tries to do a good deed for Alan.

programme.title: Starbuck
programme.desc: More than 140 people sue a fertility clinic to reveal the name of the sperm donor (Patrick Huard) whose frequent contributions resulted in 533 offspring. Starring Patrick Huard, Julie Le Breton, Antoine Bertrand.

programme.title: Easy Land
programme.desc: A mentally ill Serbian architect tries to build a better future for her daughter in Canada. Starring Mirjana Jokovic, Nina Kiri, Daniel Kash.

programme.title: Passage to Marseille
programme.desc: Five convicts escape from Devils Island to join the Free French bombing squadron fighting the Nazis during WWII. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Michèle Morgan, Claude Rains.

programme.title: Them!
programme.desc: Bug experts (Edmund Gwenn, Joan Weldon), a state trooper (James Whitmore) and an FBI agent track giant mutant ants from New Mexico to Los Angeles. Starring James Whitmore, Edmund Gwenn, Joan Weldon.

programme.title: Rodan
programme.desc: A bug-eating pterodactyl flies out of a coal mine and wrecks Japan with sonic booms. Starring Kenji Sahara, Yumi Shirakawa, Akihiko Hirata.

programme.title: Caged
programme.desc: An innocent (Eleanor Parker) lands in a womens prison with crude inmates and a big matron called Evelyn (Hope Emerson). Starring Eleanor Parker, Agnes Moorehead, Hope Emerson.

programme.title: The Ritz
programme.desc: A tubby Ohio garbageman flees from his hit-man brother-in-law to a gay Turkish bath in Manhattan. Starring Jack Weston, Rita Moreno, Jerry Stiller.

programme.title: Petulia
programme.desc: A divorced doctor (George C. Scott) has a hectic affair with a kooky married woman (Julie Christie) in 1960s San Francisco. Starring Julie Christie, George C. Scott, Richard Chamberlain.

programme.title: The Scarlet Coat
programme.desc: A Colonial major (Cornel Wilde) turns traitor to catch a British spy (Michael Wilding) plotting with Benedict Arnold. Starring Cornel Wilde, Michael Wilding, Anne Francis.

programme.title: Diane
programme.desc: Asked by Francis I to tutor his son, Diane de Poitiers becomes the future King Henry IIs mistress in the 1500s France. Starring Lana Turner, Pedro Armendáriz, Roger Moore.

programme.title: Caged
programme.desc: An innocent (Eleanor Parker) lands in a womens prison with crude inmates and a big matron called Evelyn (Hope Emerson). Starring Eleanor Parker, Agnes Moorehead, Hope Emerson.

programme.title: George Washington Slept Here
programme.desc: Unhandy New Yorkers (Jack Benny, Ann Sheridan) move into a Pennsylvania fixer-upper bought by the wife for its history. Starring Jack Benny, Ann Sheridan, Charles Coburn.

programme.title: Two Weeks With Love
programme.desc: A teenager (Jane Powell) flirts with a foreigner (Ricardo Montalban) while staying with her parents and sister at a Catskills resort. Starring Jane Powell, Ricardo Montalban, Louis Calhern.

programme.title: The Prince and the Showgirl
programme.desc: A Balkan prince regent (Laurence Olivier) courts a Milwaukee chorus girl (Marilyn Monroe) during the 1911 coronation in London. Starring Marilyn Monroe, Laurence Olivier, Sybil Thorndike.

programme.title: Splendor in the Grass
programme.desc: In 1925 Kansas, a teenage girl suffers an emotional breakdown following a platonic love affair. Beattys film debut. Starring Natalie Wood, Warren Beatty, Pat Hingle.

programme.title: The Bank Dick
programme.desc: A man inadvertently foils a robbery and is awarded the job of bank guard, forcing him to face a real holdup. Starring W.C. Fields, Cora Witherspoon, Una Merkel.

programme.title: Never Give a Sucker an Even Break
programme.desc: A tipsy comedian (W.C. Fields) has an idea for a movie, in which he falls out of a plane into a mythical country. Starring W.C. Fields, Gloria Jean, Margaret Dumont.

programme.title: International House
programme.desc: A doctor (George Burns), nurse (Gracie Allen) and professor (W.C. Fields) join the madcap fuss over an inventors television in a Chinese hotel. Starring W.C. Fields, George Burns, Gracie Allen.

programme.title: Nanook of the North
programme.desc: An Inuit and his family visit a trading post, spear fish, catch a walrus, and build an igloo. Starring Berry Kroeger.

programme.title: Moana: A Romance of the Golden Age
programme.desc: Filmmaker Robert J. Flaherty spends a year living in a village in Samoa documenting the life of the villagers.

programme.title: Tie Me Up! Tie Me Down!
programme.desc: A former mental patient (Antonio Banderas) in Spain finds his porno-star dream girl (Victoria Abril) and ties her to her bed. Starring Victoria Abril, Antonio Banderas, Lolas Leon.

programme.title: Barrios altos
programme.desc: A divorced single mother enters a world of confusion when her friend leaves a cryptic message shortly before being murdered. Starring Victoria Abril, Carmen Conesa, Mario Gas.

programme.title: The Toy Wife
programme.desc: A 19th-century Louisiana woman (Luise Rainer) has the attention of one suitor (Robert Young) but marries another (Melvyn Douglas). Starring Luise Rainer, Robert Young, Melvyn Douglas.

programme.title: Mills Blue Rhythm Band
programme.desc: The band performs at a rent party.

programme.title: Intruder in the Dust
programme.desc: An attorney in a small Southern town reluctantly takes on the case of a black farmer accused of murder. Starring David Brian, Claude Jarman, Juano Hernandez.

programme.title: The Romance of Rosy Ridge
programme.desc: A mysterious Civil War veteran (Van Johnson) courts a Missouri farmers (Thomas Mitchell) daughter (Janet Leigh) amid postwar unrest. Starring Van Johnson, Janet Leigh, Thomas Mitchell.

programme.title: Stars in My Crown
programme.desc: Man of God Josiah Gray (Joel McCrea) is determined to bring religion to the people of Walesburg, a dusty southern town still healing from the Civil War. Starring Joel McCrea, Ellen Drew, Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Highway 301
programme.desc: A network of armed robbers successfully gets away with several million dollars before the law can stop them. Starring Steve Cochran, Virginia Grey, Gaby Andre.

programme.title: The Phenix City Story
programme.desc: The son (Richard Kiley) of an ill-fated anti-crime crusader (John McIntire) tries to clean up his notorious Alabama hometown. Starring John McIntire, Richard Kiley, Kathryn Grant.

programme.title: Reflections in a Golden Eye
programme.desc: An Army major (Marlon Brando) with a lusty wife (Elizabeth Taylor) feels homosexual in the 1940s South. Starring Elizabeth Taylor, Marlon Brando, Brian Keith.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: An outlaw (Henry Fonda) working for a railroad magnate fights a stranger (Charles Bronson) for a New Orleans widows (Claudia Cardinale) land. Starring Henry Fonda, Claudia Cardinale, Charles Bronson.

programme.title: Fitzcarraldo
programme.desc: An Irish dreamer (Klaus Kinski) hauls a huge riverboat overland in his quest for opera in the Amazon. Starring Klaus Kinski, Claudia Cardinale, Jose Lewgoy.

An Italian film director (Marcello Mastroianni) seeking the meaning of life retreats from his wife (Anouk Aimee), mistress and flatterers. Starring Marcello Mastroianni, Claudia Cardinale, Anouk Aimee.

programme.title: Dont Make Waves
programme.desc: A reckless beauty (Claudia Cardinale) runs a tourist (Tony Curtis) off the road, then brings him to her lovers Malibu beach house. Starring Tony Curtis, Claudia Cardinale, Sharon Tate.

programme.title: A Fine Pair
programme.desc: A New York police captain (Rock Hudson) helps an Italian beauty (Claudia Cardinale) return some stolen jewels to a safe in Austria. Starring Rock Hudson, Claudia Cardinale, Tomas Milian.

programme.title: West Point
programme.desc: Wealthy football player Brice Wayne enters West Point and, though he does well on the football field, angers his fellow cadets. He resigns, only to return for the big game and reunite with Betty Channing, the hotel owners daughter. Starring William Haines, Joan Crawford, William Bakewell.

programme.title: Secret Service of the Air
programme.desc: An undercover agent poses as a counterfeiter to infiltrate a gang responsible for smuggling illegal aliens into the U.S. Starring Ronald Reagan, John Litel, Ila Rhodes.

programme.title: Murder in the Air
programme.desc: T-man Brass Bancroft (Ronald Reagan) boards a Navy blimp to guard an "inertia projector" from a spy. Starring Ronald Reagan, Eddie Foy, James Stephenson.

programme.title: Secret Enemies
programme.desc: FBI agents (Craig Stevens, John Ridgely) raid a New York hotel, sending Nazi spies to an upstate hunting lodge. Starring Craig Stevens, Faye Emerson, John Ridgely.

programme.title: Born for Trouble

programme.title: The Hidden Hand
programme.desc: The authorities apprehend an escaped mental patient turned serial killer. Starring Craig Stevens, Elizabeth Fraser, Julie Bishop.

programme.title: Private Detective
programme.desc: A female private eye joins forces with a police detective to investigate the suspicious murder of a millionaire. Starring Jane Wyman, Dick Foran, Gloria Dickson.

programme.title: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Brothers on opposite sides of the law clash over a stolen goods ring and their love for the same woman. Starring Richard Travis, Charles Lang, Eleanor Parker.

programme.title: Truck Busters
programme.desc: A driver leads independent truckers against big-time mob-supported operators who try to run them out of business. Starring Richard Travis, Virginia Christine, Charles Lang.

programme.title: Escape From Crime
programme.desc: An unemployed photojournalist finally gets his big break when he accidentally snaps a shot of a bank thief. Starring Richard Travis, Julie Bishop, Jackie Gleason.

programme.desc: A doctor (George Brent) frees a young woman (Hedy Lamarr) from her devious philanthropist husband (Paul Lukas). Starring Hedy Lamarr, George Brent, Paul Lukas.

programme.desc: A demoted reporter (George Brent) and his girlfriend (Brenda Marshall) seek to expose a crime kingpin. Starring George Brent, Brenda Marshall, Gene Lockhart.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac Local 137
programme.desc: The kids go on strike for wages after Bernie tries to make them clean up their mess, so he hires neighborhood kids as scabs.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Jordan brings home a snake named Reggie, and sister Bryanna demands a pet, too.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Bernie Mac Dance Party
programme.desc: Vanessa fails to invite Bernie to a father-daughter dance, and it drives him crazy.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Tryptophan-tasy
programme.desc: Gluttonous Bernie has a fever dream after devouring his own personal turkey.

programme.title: Wheres the Love?
programme.desc: Two relationship experts (Lamman Rucker, Denise Boutte) try to keep up appearances when their own marriage begins to falter.

programme.title: EZ WELL Massage System - Relax, Restore, Rejuvenate -Full-Body Relief!
programme.desc: Experience the Remedy Massage System! Feel weightless and remove pressure points with zero gravity memory foam while vibration, infrared heat, and deep tissue massage work to soothe aches, boost circulation, and relax your body. Unwind And recharge!

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Lyfes Journey
programme.desc: A family man makes a mistake that changes his life forever. Now he must start a journey to forgiveness that will bring him back to love, family and faith.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Chaos to Calm - Junior School Jumble
programme.desc: If TOP ladies had to give this school counselor a grade on organization in their school closet it would be D minus; she calls on the ladies of The Order Project for a school closet clean out and craves a system that will work for her moving forward.

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.title: Finding Tony
programme.desc: Former NBA star Tony Greene is a depressed alcoholic whose wife is violently murdered. After getting a DUI, he begins coaching a womens college basketball team.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Bon Ton
programme.desc: Discovering the banh-mi meets poboy mash-up at this funky Viet-Cajun joint, then getting groovy at their disco chic cocktail lounge with Chef Kristol Bryant.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Common Restaurant
programme.desc: Chef Sean Freeman is not just pushing boundaries, he is redefining them; with nearly all dishes made from scratch and a kitchen that feels more like a lab of flavor, Common is chasing Michelin-level recognition in a city steeped in tradition.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Parkers Smoked Meats
programme.desc: Darrel Parker learned the art of barbecue from his father, who smoked meat for over 40 years; at Parkers, he keeps that legacy alive with dishes like lamb burgers, pork chop sandwiches and smoked turkey legs.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Simple Soul of Savannah
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Silvers is changing how we think about soul food; self-taught and driven, she puts a healthier spin on classics with dishes like meatless cabbage and collards, fried whiting and pot roast.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Narra Tree
programme.desc: A tight-knit group of Filipino friends opened Narra Tree, Savannahs first Filipino restaurant; their menu is packed with soul, oxtail kare kare and pork sisig carry stories of tradition, resilience and shared dreams.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Okan
programme.desc: Chef Bernard Bennett brings the African diaspora to fine dining with West African and Caribbean-inspired dishes, such as djon djon noodles and pork belly griot; Okan honors a legacy that Savannah knows, one of resilience, rhythm and reinvention.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Klom Klom
programme.desc: In a quiet corner of Savannah, Klom Klom Thai has become a magnet for locals and celebrities alike; chef Ann Healy and PJ introduce rare Northern Thai dishes like duck Chiang Mai khao soy and boat noodles that arent easy to find.

programme.title: And Then There Was You
programme.desc: Natalie picks up the pieces of her life after her husband leaves and falls in love with a man with secrets.

programme.title: Playing Sam
programme.desc: After her ex-boyfriends acting career takes off, Samantha picks up the pieces of her broken heart and (so-called) acting career to rediscover her essence as a modern Latinx actress.

programme.title: For Richer or Poorer

programme.desc: A sorority queen (Reese Witherspoon) enrolls in Harvard to prove to her former boyfriend that she has more than good looks.

programme.title: Legally blonde 2 (2003)
programme.desc: Fired from her firm, a young Boston lawyer (Reese Witherspoon) heads to Washington, D.C., to fight for animal rights.

programme.title: That Thing You Do! (1996)
programme.desc: A small-time rock band rides a big wave of success with the help of a savvy record-executive and a catchy single.

programme.title: No Strings Attached (2011)
programme.desc: After sex enters the equation, two lifelong friends (Natalie Portman, Ashton Kutcher) make a pact to keep their relationship purely physical.

programme.title: The Birdcage (1996)
programme.desc: In Miami Beach, a gay couple pretend to be man and wife when a sons future father-in-law and family visit.

programme.title: Catch-22 (1970)
programme.desc: Air Force officers try to cope with the insanity of World War II in this adaptation of Joseph Hellers novel.

programme.title: The Way West (1967)
programme.desc: Missouri pioneers (Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum, Richard Widmark) take the Oregon Trail through rough terrain and Indian country.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate (1962)
programme.desc: A Korean War heros (Laurence Harvey) commanding officer (Frank Sinatra) discovers he and his platoon were brainwashed.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride! (1972)
programme.desc: A marshal (Lee Van Cleef), an Eastern reporter and five ex-convicts rescue widows from Mexican bandits.

programme.title: The High and the Mighty (1954)
programme.desc: On a flight from Hawaii to California, the engine dies on the plane Dan is flying. As he prepares for a crash landing, the passengers reassess their lives.

programme.title: The Fire Inside (2024)
programme.desc: The story of Claressa "T-Rex" Shields, a boxer from Flint, Mich., who trained to become the first woman in her countrys history to win an Olympic gold medal in the sport.

programme.title: Suburbicon (2017)
programme.desc: Suburbicon is a peaceful, idyllic, suburban community with affordable homes and manicured lawns. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as family man Gardner Lodge navigates the towns dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit and violence.

programme.title: Red Dawn (1984)
programme.desc: Colorado teens (Patrick Swayze, C. Thomas Howell, Lea Thompson) fight back after Soviet-led paratroops drop into town for World War III.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (2016)
programme.desc: Desperate townspeople hire seven mercenaries (Denzel Washington, Chris Pratt, Ethan Hawke) to battle a greedy industrialist (Peter Sarsgaard) and his ruthless henchmen in the Old West.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Saint (1997)
programme.desc: A clever thief who is known as the master of creating false identities using the names of Catholic saints, is hired by the Russian Mafia for his next mission. But things get complicated when he falls for Emma Russel, the scientist.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Fight or Flight (2024)
programme.desc: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking a high-value asset known only as "The Ghost" on an international flight. Realizing the plane is filled with assassins assigned to kill them both, the pair must work together in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: Frank Millers Sin City (2005)
programme.desc: Lawmen, prostitutes (Devon Aoki, Alexis Bledel), a hulking thug and other sordid characters run amok in a crime-ridden metropolis.

programme.title: 68 Kill (2017)
programme.desc: A hardworking mans inability to say no to a beautiful women gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: The Lookout (2007)
programme.desc: A brain-damaged former athlete (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) finds himself pulled into a heist at the bank where he works as a janitor.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: The Score (2001)
programme.desc: A master thief (Robert De Niro) agrees to work with a volatile partner (Edward Norton) for one last heist before he retires.

programme.title: Kindred (2025)
programme.desc: A pair of twisted, young criminals decide to break into a mansion for one big score, but they soon find out that the owners of the house are much more dangerous than they are.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Hard Home (2024)
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her daughter, a woman turns her high-tech home into a trap for the killer, initiating a deadly game of cat and mouse where every move can be fatal.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)
programme.desc: Telling fortunes to support herself and her daughter, a psychic widow (Cate Blanchett) assists the police in a missing persons case.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: The Ruins (2008)
programme.desc: Tourists fall prey to carnivorous vines ensnaring the ruins of an ancient Mayan temple.

programme.title: The Prophecy (1995)
programme.desc: Gabriel (Christopher Walken) and other angels jealous of humanity wage war using a police detective (Elias Koteas) and the soul of a Korean War veteran.

programme.title: The Ledge (2022)
programme.desc: A rock-climbing adventure turns into a living nightmare when a woman captures the murder of her best friend on camera. With nowhere to go, she begins a treacherous ascent up a mountain cliff as the killer and his friends follow close behind.

programme.title: Supercop (1992)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong policeman (Jackie Chan) and a mainland policewoman (Michelle Yeaoh) meet, team up and join a drug ring to destroy it.

programme.title: Changeland (2019)
programme.desc: A man meets up with his best friend in Thailand while going through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: Warrior (2011)
programme.desc: An Iraq War veteran (Tom Hardy) finds himself on a collision course with his estranged brother (Joel Edgerton) when both set their sights on winning a tournament in mixed martial arts.

programme.title: Man With No Past (2025)
programme.desc: Waking up in an unfamiliar city, a man with no memory must confront the mysteries of his own identity. However, his desperate search to uncover the past pits him against a powerful enemy, leading to a showdown that ultimately reveals the truth.

programme.title: Shadow Land (2024)
programme.desc: Haunted by dreams of an assassination plot, a former American president uncovers a conspiracy to discredit his legacy. With help from his trusted adviser, they embark on a dangerous mission that could expose a global crisis.

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Rachel, who is devastated by her divorce, spends her commute fantasizing about the couple that lives in a house that her train passes. One morning, she sees something shocking and becomes entangled in a missing persons investigation.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: Nocturnal Animals (2016)
programme.desc: A writer (Jake Gyllenhaal) asks his ex-wife (Amy Adams) to read a manuscript of his new novel, a troubling story about a family man whose life takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: Reluctantly pressed into service again, a former military sniper plots revenge against his powerful foes after being betrayed and wounded.

programme.title: The Yards (2000)
programme.desc: A friends lure of easy money draws an ex-con into the corrupt world of his uncles subway-train business.

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray (2014)
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facilitys longtime detainees.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Coach Carter (2005)
programme.desc: A high-school basketball coach (Samuel L. Jackson) turns a losing team around, then faces criticism for pushing the athletes to put grades first.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Vicious (2025)
programme.desc: A strange ritual soon unravels into a waking nightmare when a woman receives a mysterious box that comes with instructions to place three things inside: something you need, something you hate, and something you love.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A detective (Morgan Freeman) and a Secret Service agent (Monica Potter) investigate the abduction of a senators daughter from a school.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance (2001)
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mothers death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)
programme.desc: Telling fortunes to support herself and her daughter, a psychic widow (Cate Blanchett) assists the police in a missing persons case.

programme.title: The House of Yes (1997)
programme.desc: A man (Josh Hamilton) and his fiancee (Tori Spelling) visit his warped clan, complete with dark mansion and incestuous twin sister (Parker Posey).

programme.title: Like Water for Chocolate (1992)
programme.desc: The youngest daughter (Lumi Cavazos) of a Mexican family expresses her feelings in preparing wonderful food, when tradition keeps her from marrying her true love (Marco Leonardi).

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Assassination Nation (2018)
programme.desc: A small town gets turned upside down when an anonymous hacker reveals personal messages and secrets of thousands of people. As anger erupts into full-blown violence, four teenage girls find themselves in a fight for their lives against an armed mob.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Morning Glory (2010)
programme.desc: Disaster follows a producers (Rachel McAdams) decision to bring in a legendary TV anchor (Harrison Ford) to revitalize a struggling morning-news program.

programme.title: Nobodys Fool (2018)
programme.desc: Wild child Tanya looks to her buttoned-up, by-the-book sister Danica to help her get back on her feet. As these polar opposites collide, Tanya soon discovers that Danicas picture-perfect life and boyfriend may not be what they seem.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart (2007)
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie) begins a terrifying search for her husband, journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman), after he is kidnapped by terrorists in 2002 Pakistan.

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)
programme.desc: A single woman (Jennifer Lopez) meets the man (Alex OLoughlin) of her dreams on the same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: In an insurance scam, a man fakes his death and sets his wife up to take the blame. After serving 10 years in prison, she sets out to get revenge, immune from the law since she cannot be re-prosecuted for the same crime.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides (1999)
programme.desc: Men reminisce about intriguing sisters, whose parents (James Woods, Kathleen Turner) quarantined them after one of the five killed herself.

programme.title: Shes Out of My League (2010)
programme.desc: An airport security agent must figure out how to make the relationship work when a beautiful, successful woman falls in love with him.

programme.title: Beautiful Girls (1996)
programme.desc: The opposite sex preoccupies working-class pals gathered for their high-school reunion in small-town Massachusetts.

programme.title: Becoming Jane (2007)
programme.desc: Though her parents expect her to marry a wealthy suitor, young Jane Austen (Anne Hathaway) becomes involved with a penniless lawyer (James McAvoy) who inspires her future writings.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest (1981)
programme.desc: Movie queen Joan Crawford (Faye Dunaway) pampers and punishes her adopted son and daughter (Diana Scarwid).

programme.title: Dreamland (2019)
programme.desc: A teen bounty hunter is torn between helping or capturing a seductive fugitive bank robber hiding in his small town during the Great Depression.
